The Payment Card Industry (or PCI) is an independent council in the payments industry requiring companies that process, store, or
transmit credit card information to keep transactions secure and protect against card data breaches. To be compliant with both the
PCI data security standards and card brand rules and regulations, you need to perform validation on an annual basis.
Providing payment protection solutions to help secure your payments and support your compliance is our top priority. To
strengthen your protection, were introducing SaferPayments.
SaferPayments offers you a streamlined, self-service PCI compliance tool to help simplify the PCI DSS validation process and
breach assistance* and will be available the week of June 7, 2021**. SaferPayments also introduces an easier path to compliance
through SaferPayments Managed. This upgraded service offers all the protection of SaferPayments plus the support of a trained
compliance professional to walk you through the SAQ and fully manage your PCI Compliance. It also provides access to a suite of
security tools to help protect your business. SaferPayments Managed helps take the guess work out of PCI validation and helps you
avoid PCI non-validation fees. You can elect to upgrade now for a flat fee of $49.95/MID/month by calling
advantage of the service at no charge until billing begins July 1, 2021.Go to
https://saferpayments.yoursecurejourney.com/information to learn more about this offering.
You will receive new login credentials and instructions on how to access the SaferPayments portal to report your compliance the
week of June 7, 2021. The email will come from notifications@yoursecurejourney.com. Please make note of this email address and
have it whitelisted as it will provide important information on how to log in and validate your PCI DSS compliance. If you do not
receive a credential email, you can access the portal by logging into https://saferpayments.yoursecurejourney.com. Click First
sign-in on this page and input your merchant ID.
If you continue to be non-compliant and do not validate your compliance by July 31, 2021, you may be assessed an increased
processor charged PCI non-validation fee up to $19.95/MID/month. If you have questions about SaferPayments, please call the
SaferPayments help line at 866-493-8756 or via email at support@yoursecurejourney.com.
* Additional information regarding the Breach Assist program can be found at www.RoyalGroupServices.com/breach-assist/.
** If you have an existing PCI program from Worldpay, this will replace it.Your existing PCI program fees will continue to be
charged until the new billing for SaferPayments begins effective July 1, 2021.
